description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, upholstered in a light gray fabric. The sofa features a total of seven loose, rectangular back cushions in a contrasting dark gray color, providing ample support and a visually striking two-tone appearance. The seat cushions are thick and uniform, seamlessly integrated into the frame for a clean, contemporary look. The armrests are straight, low-profile, and padded, matching the main upholstery and contributing to the sofa's boxy silhouette. The sofa stands on short, black cylindrical legs, slightly elevating it off the ground and adding to its modern aesthetic. Its spacious design and neutral color palette make it suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, lounges, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light gray fabric with dark gray loose back cushions and short black legs. It features a left-facing chaise, straight padded armrests, and a clean, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, left-facing chaise, and all seven dark gray back cushions against the light gray upholstery.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the chaise, the arrangement of cushions, and the sofa's overall sectional layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous light gray back and the tops of the dark gray cushions, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the straight armrest, the length of the chaise, and the alignment of the sofa's legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Seven loose, rectangular back cushions in dark gray are placed along the backrest, with three on the chaise and four on the main section; seat cushions are thick, uniform, and integrated into the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests at both ends, matching the light gray upholstery, with a boxy, padded appearance and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six short, cylindrical black legs positioned at the corners and central support points, exposed and evenly spaced for stability.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, supporting loose back cushions without visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
